violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food stored on the floor in walk in cooler and walk in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Stand up freezers/coolers not cleaned as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)

Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
